description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named irctest that runs on pull requests, pushes, and a weekly schedule. The workflow has two jobs: build and test. The build job compiles inspircd with optimizations for irctest on an ubuntu-24.04-arm environment, and uploads the binary to a temporary storage. The test job, which depends on the build job, downloads the binary, and runs it through irctest with three different services: no services, Anope, and Atheme.
